summary: Restart and Focus App actions work for menu bar apps like Ollama, and Focus App now shows memory-saving steps before opening the browser.
changed: Focus App — shows a Free memory in {app} dialog with browser-specific tips (close tabs, Task Manager, extensions) before an Open {app} button brings the app to the front
fixed: Restart App — menu bar and background apps such as Ollama are found via accessory activation policy and com.electron.ollama; subprocess names like ollama serve and llama-server resolve correctly
Quit App — same improved lookup for Ollama and other non-Dock apps with an installed .app bundle
